subcodes.first_line: Lo, the clouds pour down, and the verses descend, and the light hasteneth before the Face, yet the people remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السحاب یمطر و الایات تنزل و النور یسعی بین یدی الوجه ولکن القوم هم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @purpose; goal of creation, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
